hero.heading: Early Bird tickets launching in May!
hero.body_lg: The world's biggest Ethereum conference returns – join us in Mumbai, India from 3–6 November 2026.
hero.body: Be the first to know when tickets drop - follow us or subscribe to our newsletter.

overview.heading: Overview
overview.body: Tickets to Devcon India will be distributed through three different methods:

sale_waves.heading: Sale waves
sale_waves.body_lg: General Admission tickets to Devcon will be distributed via waves, beginning with our Global Early Bird launch in May.
sale_waves.body_suffix: to purchase a general admission Devcon India ticket. Follow us on socials or subscribe to our newsletter to stay updated!
